name: Gelato Di Pesche
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 lb Fully ripe peaches, peeled (optional), halved and pitted
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and 2 cups water in a heavy-bottomed saucepan. Stir over medium heat until the sugar dissolves.
2. Raise the heat and bring the mixture to a boil. Continue boiling for 5 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and let the syrup cool completely.
4. Puree the peaches in a food processor or blender. Measure out 2 cups of puree and stir in lemon juice.
5. Add the peach puree to the cooled sugar syrup and chill thoroughly. Also chill the cream.
6. Whip the cream until it forms soft peaks.
7. Fold the whipped cream into the fruit mixture.
8. Transfer the mixture to an ice cream machine and freeze according to the machine's directions.
Makes 1 Quart
